expressions.english: a person one knows; an acquaintance
to know well
from what I understand; as far as I know
I know roughly.
Now I understand it.
How do you know that?
expressions.notes:
그걸 = that, that thing (object)
그걸 is the contracted form of 그것을.
어떻게 = how

expressions.english: Don't pretend you know.; Don't act as if you know.
Yoona might know.
expressions.notes: -(으)ㄹ 수도 있다 = may/might + V; can/could + V

expressions.english: Why did you pretend not to know when you do (actually) know?
expressions.notes:
-(으)면서 = while + S + V-ing
왜 = why; for what reason; how come
모르다 = to not know

expressions.english: If you know the answer, tell me quickly.
expressions.notes:
빨리다 = to be fast
빨리 is an adverb form of 빠르다.

expressions.english: I learned (about it) through my friend.
expressions.notes:
통해서 = through, via
-게 되다 = will + V (unintentionally); to get to + V; to end up + V-ing

expressions.english:
Can I know the phone number?
Can I get the phone number?
Why didn't you tell me when you knew?
expressions.notes:
-(으)면서도 = even though; (even) while; even when
말 = language; what one says; expression; word; term
말을 하다 = to speak; to talk; to tell; to say

expressions.english: Only Hyojin knows the password.
Do you, by any chance, know Seokjin's phone number?

expressions.korean: 그 일에 대해서라면 제가 잘 알아요.
expressions.english:
When it comes to that (subject), I know a lot about it.
I know about that (subject) well.
expressions.notes: -에 대해서라면 = about + N; when it comes to + N

expressions.korean: 그 사람이 어디 있는지 알 것 같아요.
expressions.english: I think I know where he is.
Everyone (already) knew, but I was the only one who did not know.

expressions.korean: 제가 알기로는 그 사람은 지금 출장 중 이에요.
expressions.english: From what I know, that person is now on a business trip.
expressions.notes:
출장 = business trip
중 = in, in the middle of

expressions.korean: 어제 영화관에서 우연히 아는 사람을 만났어요.
expressions.english: I bumped into a person I know in the movie theater yesterday.
expressions.notes:
어제 = yesterday
영화관 = movie theater, cinema
우연히 = by chance
우연히 만나다 = to bump into someone
